sessions.artist: Magnum: First broadcast of session recorded 13/5/1983
sessions.details: Available on The Classic Collection 2xCD, 2006 (Metro Doubles, METRDCD584). Bob Catley (vocals), Tony Clarkin (guitar), Mark Stanway (keyboards), Wally Lowe (bass), Kex Gorin (drums), Robin George (guitar)
